osm/way/1510420026.summary: Unnamed OSM polygon in Mount Pleasant, Racine County, WI — part of Microsoft's 'Fairwater' AI datacenter campus on the former Foxconn (Wisconn Valley) site. Purpose-built for large-scale AI training on NVIDIA GB200 hardware; a separate curated record tracks the full ~3.3 GW campus.

osm/way/502927599.summary: Multi-tenant data center ('Data Center Lenexa') in Lenexa, KS. Limited public detail; classified from the facility name.

osm/way/210917861.summary: Facility named 'Data Storage Centers' in Phoenix, AZ, appearing to be a colocation/data-storage provider. Classified from the facility name with limited public detail.

osm/way/1194169753.summary: Large (~2.2M sq ft) data center under construction in the Bristow/Gainesville area of Prince William County, VA — the heart of Northern Virginia's 'Data Center Alley.' OSM tags the general contractor as HITT (a leading mission-critical builder), so the end operator/tenant is not yet confirmed; the scale and location are consistent with hyperscale/wholesale development in this corridor (e.g., Amazon's nearby Devlin Technology Park).

osm/way/1528887658.summary: Small facility of Landmax Data Systems, Inc., a Rush, NY data/records-management and IT-services firm. Tiny footprint (~1,500 sq ft) supporting the company's own service operations rather than wholesale lease; classified from the facility name.

osm/way/1414729942.summary: Cryptocurrency (Bitcoin) mining operation in Campbell County, Wyoming, near Gillette, per its OpenStreetMap description (tagged telecom=data_center). Sits in the Powder River Basin energy region that has drawn crypto miners with cheap coal/gas power; small ~6,000 sq ft footprint.
